evals.description: Skill triggers when user asks about Cloudflare Workers
evals.prompt: Help me write a Cloudflare Worker that redirects users based on their country

evals.description: Skill triggers when user asks about CDN cache configuration
evals.prompt: What Cache-Control headers should I set for my static assets served through a CDN?

evals.description: Skill triggers for edge latency optimization questions
evals.prompt: How can I reduce TTFB for my global web application?

evals.description: Agent can write a Worker with KV namespace for feature flags
evals.prompt: Write a Cloudflare Worker that reads feature flags from KV and returns a maintenance page when maintenance mode is enabled

evals.description: Agent can implement A/B testing at the edge with sticky cookies
evals.prompt: Implement A/B testing at the CDN edge layer using Cloudflare Workers with sticky user assignment via cookies

evals.description: Agent can configure proper cache headers for different content types
evals.prompt: Set up Cache-Control headers for three types of content: static hashed assets, dynamic HTML pages, and API responses

evals.description: Agent can implement rate limiting using Durable Objects
evals.prompt: Build a rate limiter at the edge using Cloudflare Durable Objects that limits each IP to 100 requests per minute

evals.description: Agent can use geo-routing to direct traffic to regional origins
evals.prompt: Write a Cloudflare Worker that routes API requests to the nearest regional backend based on the user's continent

evals.description: Agent warns about KV eventual consistency for counters
evals.prompt: I want to use Cloudflare KV to implement a page view counter. Is that a good approach?

evals.description: Agent warns about Node.js APIs not being available in Workers
evals.prompt: Can I use the fs module in my Cloudflare Worker to read a config file?

evals.description: Agent warns about Vary header for personalized cached responses
evals.prompt: My CDN is serving cached responses that contain the wrong user's data. What's happening?

evals.description: Agent does not invent non-existent Cloudflare Worker APIs
evals.prompt: How do I use the Workers filesystem API to write temporary files during request processing?

evals.description: Agent does not hallucinate a Workers database API
evals.prompt: Use the built-in Workers SQL API to query my database directly from the edge

evals.description: Agent correctly references the CDN caching reference file for detailed cache invalidation
evals.prompt: I need to set up surrogate key based cache invalidation across multiple CDN providers. What are the differences?
